meta.description: Historical events corpus for Vibe Engine validation. Each event has curated headlines and expected emotional profiles.

events.name: September 11 Attacks
events.rationale: Universally understood as terrifying. Fear should dominate with sadness and anger as secondary.
headlines: Hijacked jets destroy twin towers and hit Pentagon; thousands feared dead
America under attack: Planes crash into World Trade Center, Pentagon in terrorist acts
Terrorists destroy World Trade Center, hit Pentagon in raid with hijacked jets
A creeping horror: Buildings full of people crumble to the earth in clouds of dust and smoke
Hundreds of firefighters and police feared dead as towers collapse

events.name: Apollo 11 Moon Landing
events.rationale: One of humanity's greatest achievements. Joy and wonder should dominate.
headlines: Men walk on moon: Astronauts land on a plain, collect rocks, plant flag
The Eagle has landed: Two men fulfill mankind's dream with a walk on the moon
Man takes first steps on the moon: 'That's one small step for man, one giant leap for mankind'
Armstrong and Aldrin walk on moon as millions watch in awe on television
A magnificent triumph: America puts men on the moon

events.name: COVID-19 Global Lockdowns
events.rationale: Pandemic fears. Strong fear with anticipation (what's coming) and sadness (loss of normalcy).
headlines: Nation shuts down: President declares national emergency as coronavirus cases surge
Schools close, events canceled, borders shut as pandemic fears grip the world
Global pandemic declared: WHO warns worst is yet to come as death toll climbs
Life as we know it grinds to a halt: Cities empty as lockdown orders spread
Hospitals brace for surge as coronavirus cases double every three days

events.name: COVID-19 Vaccine Approval
events.rationale: Relief and hope after months of pandemic. Joy and anticipation for end of crisis.
headlines: FDA authorizes Pfizer vaccine, millions of doses to ship immediately
A shot of hope: First COVID vaccine approved in record time as pandemic rages
The beginning of the end: Vaccine rollout starts as world celebrates breakthrough
Historic moment: First Americans receive COVID-19 vaccine as new era begins
Scientists deliver miracle: Vaccine developed in under a year wins emergency approval

events.name: 2008 Financial Crisis
events.rationale: Economic catastrophe. Fear of collapse with anger at institutions and sadness over losses.
headlines: Wall Street in crisis as Lehman Brothers files for bankruptcy and Merrill Lynch is sold
Financial meltdown: Dow plunges 504 points as fear grips global markets
The economy is in shambles: Banks fail, markets crash, retirement savings vanish overnight
Panic on Wall Street as century-old institutions crumble in worst crisis since Great Depression
Millions face foreclosure as housing market collapses and credit dries up

events.name: Osama bin Laden Killed
events.rationale: Shocking news with complex emotional response. Surprise at the event, relief/joy for many, but morally complex.
headlines: Bin Laden is dead: U.S. forces kill al-Qaeda leader in Pakistan compound raid
Justice has been done: Obama announces death of 9/11 mastermind after decade-long hunt
Got him: Navy SEALs kill Osama bin Laden in dramatic nighttime raid
America's most wanted man killed in covert operation that stunned the world
Crowds celebrate outside White House as bin Laden's death is confirmed

events.name: George Floyd Protests
events.rationale: Outrage over police violence. Anger should strongly dominate with sadness and disgust.
headlines: A man cried 'I can't breathe' and died under a police officer's knee. Now a city burns.
Protests erupt across America after video shows officer kneeling on Black man's neck for nine minutes
Minneapolis in flames: National Guard deployed as fury over George Floyd's death spreads
Enough is enough: Millions march against police brutality in largest protests in decades
Outrage and grief: How the death of one man ignited a movement across every state

events.name: Trump Wins 2016 Election
events.rationale: The most polarizing event. Models should DISAGREE — some read joy/anticipation, others fear/anger. High divergence IS the correct read.
headlines: Trump triumphs: Outsider candidate shocks the world with stunning upset victory
Donald Trump is elected president in stunning repudiation of the establishment
Against all odds: Trump defeats Clinton in election that defied every prediction
Markets tumble, world leaders react with shock as Trump wins White House
America wakes up to a new reality: The most divisive candidate in memory is the next president

events.name: Hurricane Katrina
events.rationale: Catastrophic natural disaster with government failure. Fear and sadness with anger at the response.
headlines: Catastrophe: Hurricane Katrina devastates Gulf Coast, levees breach, New Orleans floods
Thousands stranded on rooftops as floodwaters swallow New Orleans
Where is the help? Desperate residents plead for rescue as city descends into chaos
Death toll climbs as magnitude of Katrina's destruction becomes clear
A city drowning: Katrina leaves trail of devastation, thousands feared dead

events.name: SpaceX First Rocket Landing
events.rationale: Technological triumph. Joy and surprise at the achievement, anticipation for the future of spaceflight.
headlines: SpaceX makes history: Falcon 9 rocket lands upright after delivering satellites to orbit
The rocket landed! SpaceX successfully returns booster to Earth in revolutionary first
Elon Musk's SpaceX achieves the impossible: A reusable rocket that lands itself
Welcome back, baby: SpaceX Falcon 9 sticks the landing to cheers of jubilant engineers
A new era of spaceflight begins as SpaceX proves rockets can be reused

events.name: Fukushima Nuclear Disaster
events.rationale: Earthquake, tsunami, and nuclear meltdown. Overwhelming fear with sadness and shock.
headlines: Japan earthquake and tsunami: Nuclear emergency declared as reactors face meltdown
Triple disaster: Earthquake, tsunami, and nuclear crisis push Japan to the brink
Radiation fears grow as explosions rock Fukushima nuclear plant after devastating tsunami
Japan faces worst crisis since World War II as nuclear reactors spiral out of control
Thousands dead, millions displaced as 9.0 earthquake triggers catastrophic tsunami

events.name: Brexit Vote
events.rationale: Polarizing and unexpected result. Like Trump, models should show high divergence reflecting the divided response.
headlines: Britain votes to leave EU in stunning rejection of European project
Brexit: The day Britain chose to go it alone, sending shockwaves across the globe
Markets crash, pound plummets as UK votes to leave European Union
Cameron resigns after Britain's historic vote to leave EU defies predictions
A nation divided: Leave wins by narrow margin as Britain enters uncharted territory

events.name: Germany 7-1 Brazil (World Cup 2014)
events.rationale: Utter shock. The most surprising result in World Cup history. Joy for Germany, devastation for Brazil.
headlines: Germany humiliates Brazil 7-1 in most shocking World Cup result in history
Carnage in Belo Horizonte: Germany scores five goals in 18 minutes to destroy Brazil's dream
Brazil's worst nightmare: Host nation suffers historic, humiliating defeat
Unbelievable: Germany dismantles Brazil in semifinal rout that left a nation in tears
Seven goals, one devastated nation: Germany delivers the most stunning upset ever seen

events.name: Obama Elected President
events.rationale: Historic milestone. Joy and hope should dominate in the headline coverage.
headlines: Obama elected president as racial barrier falls in decisive victory
Yes we can: Barack Obama makes history as America's first Black president
Obama wins: A new chapter in American history begins with landslide victory
From dream to reality: Obama's victory brings tears of joy and hope for change
America elects Barack Obama, shattering a barrier as old as the republic itself

events.name: Kobe Bryant Death
events.rationale: Sudden loss of a beloved figure and his daughter. Profound sadness with shock.
headlines: Kobe Bryant killed in helicopter crash along with daughter Gianna and seven others
A legend gone too soon: Basketball icon Kobe Bryant dies at 41 in fiery helicopter crash
The world mourns Kobe: Tributes pour in as news of basketball star's death stuns millions
Kobe Bryant and daughter Gianna among nine killed in foggy hillside helicopter crash
Heartbroken: Lakers fans gather at Staples Center in grief after Kobe Bryant's death

events.name: Boston Marathon Bombing
events.rationale: Terrorist attack on civilians. Fear and anger with deep sadness for victims.
headlines: Bombs explode at Boston Marathon finish line, killing three and injuring hundreds
Terror at the marathon: Twin blasts turn celebration into carnage
Boston under siege: City in lockdown as manhunt for marathon bombers intensifies
Blood on Boylston Street: Explosions shatter the joy of a beloved American tradition
Who did this? FBI launches massive investigation as Boston reels from deadly attack

events.name: Supreme Court Legalizes Same-Sex Marriage
events.rationale: Civil rights milestone celebrated by supporters. Joy and relief should dominate in headlines.
headlines: Supreme Court rules same-sex couples have right to marry nationwide
Love wins: Supreme Court declares marriage equality the law of the land
A historic day for civil rights: Same-sex marriage legalized in all 50 states
Tears of joy outside Supreme Court as couples celebrate landmark ruling
Equal at last: Court rules Constitution guarantees right to marry for all Americans

events.name: Russia Invades Ukraine
events.rationale: Full-scale war in Europe. Fear of escalation with anger and sadness.
headlines: Russia attacks Ukraine: Explosions rock cities as Putin launches full-scale invasion
War in Europe: Russian forces cross into Ukraine from multiple directions
Ukraine under fire: Missiles and bombs rain down on cities as world watches in horror
Putin defies warnings and invades Ukraine in largest military assault since World War II
Kyiv under attack: Ukrainians flee as Russian troops advance on the capital

events.name: Titan Submersible Implosion
events.rationale: Claustrophobic horror and tragic loss. Fear of the deep-sea scenario with sadness at the deaths.
headlines: All five aboard Titan submersible dead after catastrophic implosion near Titanic wreck
Debris field confirms worst fears: OceanGate sub suffered catastrophic failure on descent
Five lives lost in the deep: Titan submersible imploded in milliseconds, experts say
The search is over: Coast Guard confirms Titan crew killed in implosion near the Titanic
A billionaire's fatal gamble: How a deep-sea expedition ended in tragedy

events.name: Japan Beats Germany and Spain at 2022 World Cup
events.rationale: Major underdog victory. Shock and delight should dominate.
headlines: Japan stuns the world: Comeback victory over Germany sends shockwaves through World Cup
Unbelievable: Japan rallies from behind to beat four-time champions Germany 2-1
Giant-killing Japan does it again, shocking Spain to top their World Cup group
Japan's miracle run: Two come-from-behind victories over football royalty electrify the tournament
The greatest upset of the tournament: Japan proves the World Cup really is anyone's game
